professions.name: Blacksmith
professions.npcGreeting: The iron calls, adventurer. Place your piece on the anvil — I'll make something of it.
professions.description: Forges heavy armor from ore and crystal. Also hosts the Salvage station for dismantling gear.

masteryBonus.desc: +10% gear stat rolls when equipping items

professions.name: Alchemist
professions.npcGreeting: Every drop counts, every herb has its purpose. What shall I brew for you?
professions.description: Brews potions and elixirs from gathered materials. Also hosts the Transmutation station for upgrading gear.

masteryBonus.desc: +2 extra quest charges on crafted potions

professions.name: Enchanter
professions.npcGreeting: Show me your gear... I can awaken the hidden magic within.
professions.description: Enchants gear with bonus stats and hosts the Enchanting station for targeted stat rerolling.

professions.name: Tailor
professions.npcGreeting: Every thread tells a story. Let me see which one becomes yours.
professions.description: Crafts cloth armor imbued with arcane resonance. Cloth pieces boost XP per slot equipped.

masteryBonus.desc: +10% cloth armor stat rolls when crafting

professions.name: Cook
professions.npcGreeting: Hungry? Sit down! My stew heals body and soul.
professions.description: Cooks meals from gathered herbs and materials. Meals grant temporary buffs.

masteryBonus.desc: +2 extra quest charges on crafted meals

professions.name: Leatherworker
professions.npcGreeting: Good leather tells a story, friend. Let me see what hide you've brought — I'll shape it into something worth wearing.
professions.description: Tans and shapes leather into flexible armor. Specializes in balanced gear with gold-finding properties.

masteryBonus.desc: +10% leather armor stat rolls when equipping items

gatheringConfig.description: Active professions passively gather their affinity materials on quest completion. Chance scales with profession level.

masteryConfig.description: At profession skill 225+, a passive mastery bonus activates for that profession.

materials.name: Iron Ore
materials.desc: Base material for smithing.

materials.name: Arcane Dust
materials.desc: Fine dust with magical resonance.

materials.name: Crystal Shard
materials.desc: A shimmering shard from the depths.

materials.name: Dragon Scale
materials.desc: A rare scale infused with primal magic.

materials.name: Aether Core
materials.desc: A pulsing core of pure energy.

materials.name: Herb Bundle
materials.desc: Freshly gathered herbs for potions.

materials.name: Moonpetal
materials.desc: Blooms only under moonlight.

materials.name: Phoenix Feather
materials.desc: A glowing feather full of life force.

materials.name: Runestone
materials.desc: A stone engraved with ancient runes.

materials.name: Soul Fragment
materials.desc: A fragment of an ancient soul. Extremely rare.

materials.name: Leinenstoff
materials.desc: Grobes Leinen, gewebt aus Pflanzenfasern. Grundlage jeder Schneiderarbeit.

materials.name: Wollstoff
materials.desc: Weiches Gewebe aus Bergwolle. Warm und widerstandsfähig.

materials.name: Seidenstoff
materials.desc: Schimmerndes Tuch, durchzogen von arkaner Resonanz.

materials.name: Magiestoff
materials.desc: Mit reiner Magie durchwirktes Gewebe. Vibriert bei Berührung.

materials.name: Runenstoff
materials.desc: Legendärer Stoff, in den uralte Runen eingewebt sind. Flüstert vergessene Worte.

materials.name: Wild Game
materials.desc: Fresh meat from the wilderness.

materials.name: Fireroot
materials.desc: A spicy root that warms from within.

materials.name: Starfruit
materials.desc: A luminous fruit from the celestial gardens.

materials.name: Leichtes Leder
materials.desc: Supple hide from common beasts. The foundation of any tanner's craft.

materials.name: Mittleres Leder
materials.desc: Thicker leather with a natural sheen. Takes well to tooling and dyeing.

materials.name: Schweres Leder
materials.desc: Dense, weather-hardened hide. Nearly as tough as chain when properly treated.

materials.name: Dickes Leder
materials.desc: Exceptionally thick hide from apex predators. Each piece tells of a dangerous hunt.

materials.name: Raues Leder
materials.desc: Primordial leather from creatures older than the world. Almost alive beneath the needle.

recipes.name: Potion of Fortune
recipes.desc: +20% Loot chance for the next 3 quests.

recipes.name: Flask of Ambition
recipes.desc: +25% XP + 20% Gold for the next 5 quests. Masterwork brew.

recipes.name: Temporary Enchantment
recipes.desc: Adds +2-4 to a random stat for 24 hours.

recipes.name: Runic Polish
recipes.desc: Cleanses an item with rune energy, adding +1-2 to a random minor stat for 48 hours.

recipes.name: Glyph of Warding
recipes.desc: Inscribes a protective glyph granting +8% damage reduction for 3 quests.

recipes.name: Permanent Enchantment
recipes.desc: Permanently adds +1-2 to a minor stat on an item.

recipes.name: Arcane Infusion
recipes.desc: Adds +3-5 to a random primary stat permanently. Requires rare reagents.

recipes.name: Hearty Stew
recipes.desc: +5% XP for the next 5 quests. Warms body and soul.

recipes.name: Star Banquet
recipes.desc: +15% XP + 10% Gold for the next 3 quests. A grand feast!

recipes.name: Champion's Feast
recipes.desc: +20% XP + 15% Gold + 10% Luck for 5 quests. The ultimate meal.

recipes.name: Flask of Embers
recipes.desc: +15% Forge Temperature recovery for 3 quests. A Zirkel der Glut secret.

recipes.name: Scholar's Ink
recipes.desc: +10% bonus XP from Learning quests for 5 quests. Zirkel der Tinte knowledge.

recipes.name: Resonance Charm
recipes.desc: +20% Luck for 3 quests. Attuned to the Zirkel des Echos frequencies.

recipes.name: Minor Healing Draught
recipes.desc: +3% XP for the next 2 quests. A beginner's brew.

recipes.name: Elixir of Focus
recipes.desc: +5% XP for the next 3 quests. Sharpens the mind.

recipes.name: Elixir of Resilience
recipes.desc: +8% Gold for the next 3 quests. Hardens resolve.

recipes.name: Greater Elixir of Experience
recipes.desc: +15% XP for the next 3 quests. Advanced brew.

recipes.name: Transmute: Crystal Shard
recipes.desc: Transmute 5 Iron Ore into 1 Crystal Shard. Alchemy at its finest.

recipes.name: Transmute: Dragon Scale
recipes.desc: Transmute 3 Crystal Shards into 1 Dragon Scale. Rare transmutation.

recipes.name: Flask of Golden Fortune
recipes.desc: +20% Gold for the next 5 quests. Master alchemist's pride.

recipes.name: Simple Bread
recipes.desc: +3% XP for the next 3 quests. Basic nourishment.

recipes.name: Spiced Stew
recipes.desc: +8% XP for the next 4 quests. Warms and invigorates.

recipes.name: Traveler's Ration
recipes.desc: +5% Gold for the next 5 quests. Sustenance for the road.

recipes.name: Grilled Moonpetal Steak
recipes.desc: +12% XP for the next 4 quests. The scent alone boosts morale.

recipes.name: Dragon-Spiced Roast
recipes.desc: +15% Gold + 10% XP for 4 quests. Dragonfire seasoning.

recipes.name: Phoenixfire Feast
recipes.desc: +25% XP + 20% Gold for 3 quests. The ultimate meal.

recipes.name: Minor Ward
recipes.desc: A basic protective ward. +1 to a random minor stat for 24h.

recipes.name: Arcane Shield
recipes.desc: +5% damage reduction for 3 quests. A shimmering barrier.

recipes.name: Crystal Focus
recipes.desc: +2 to a random stat for 48h. Crystal-amplified magic.

recipes.name: Greater Ward
recipes.desc: +10% damage reduction for 3 quests. A fortified barrier.

recipes.name: Soul Infusion
recipes.desc: Permanently adds +2-3 to a primary stat on equipped gear. Master enchanting.

recipes.name: Stahlbarren
recipes.desc: Härtet Eisenerz mit Kristallsplittern zu Stahl.

recipes.name: Arkanitbarren
recipes.desc: Schmiedet Aetherkerne zu reinstem Arkanit. Einmal täglich.

recipes.name: Thoriumbarren
recipes.desc: Seltenes Metall, geschmiedet unter extremer Hitze.

recipes.name: Waffe temperieren
recipes.desc: +2-4 auf einen zufälligen Primärstat (permanent, nur Waffen).

recipes.name: Schild polieren
recipes.desc: +1-3 auf einen zufälligen Primärstat (permanent, nur Schild).

recipes.name: Seltenheit aufwerten
recipes.desc: 50% Chance, die Seltenheit eines Items um eine Stufe zu erhöhen.

recipes.name: Meisterwerk-Verstärkung
recipes.desc: +5-8 auf einen zufälligen Primärstat. Nur für Artisans.

recipes.name: Leinenballen
recipes.desc: Webt Leinenstoff zu einem festen Ballen.

recipes.name: Stoffveredelung
recipes.desc: 50% Chance: Seltenheit eines Cloth-Items um 1 erhöhen.
